name: add_shortcut
description: Add a new voice command shortcut to the HAVPE server. Shortcuts short-circuit the normal voice pipeline so the command triggers a URL directly without going through the LLM. They are meant for running specific home automation macros (e.g. turning lights on/off, goodnight routines). Because they bypass the LLM, the regex should be fairly specific to avoid false matches. The regex is evaluated case-insensitively, and should be constructed to ignore punctuation (commas, full stops, question marks, etc.) that speech-to-text may insert, since transcripts include spurious punctuation.

regex.description: The regex pattern to match spoken phrases. Case insensitive, should tolerant of spurious punctuation from speech-to-text.

url.description: The URL to open when the regex matches.
